nasb.text: But a messenger came to Saul, saying, “Hurry and come, for the Philistines have made a raid on the land.”

esv.text: a messenger came to Saul, saying, “Hurry and come, for the Philistines have made a raid against the land.”

cnv.text: 那時忽有使者來見掃羅說：“請你趕快回去，因為非利士人來突擊這地。”

ccb.text: 这时，扫罗的信使前来禀报，说非利士人前来犯境，请王速回。
